data.answer: The naive ratio of 3.847x is not a breach because the covenant test uses Adjusted EBITDA (985.0) after permitted addbacks, not EBITDA before addbacks (785.0), resulting in a Leverage Ratio of 3.066x against the §6.6A threshold of 3.75x [7][8]. The Device Strategy addback of 155 and Quality addback of 45 are fully allowed under the amended Permitted Addbacks definition, with no disallowed amounts [8].

The Device Strategy addback of 155 and Quality addback of 45 are fully allowed under the amended Permitted Addbacks definition, with no disallowed amounts [8]."}
